sp_widget.name: IncentNow Form
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"disableUIActions","section":"Behavior","label":"Disable UI Actions on Form","type":"boolean"},{"name":"showFormView","section":"Behavior","label":"Display current form view","type":"boolean"},{"name":"omitHeaderOptions","section":"Behavior","label":"Omit header options icon","type":"boolean"}]
sp_widget.template: {{data.table_label}}
